summary: Enthusiastic fan memory of a greatest‑hits style 1991 show, but recording source and quality are not detailed.
review: The lone review celebrates the concert as a "greatest hits" experience that left lasting nostalgia, awarding it five stars. No specifics about the audio source or fidelity are given, so the technical quality remains unclear while the musical impression is unmistakably positive.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one highly‑rated review, praising the show but offering no recording details; rating reflects strong show perception with unknown audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments on sound clarity, mix, or source type were provided in the review.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as a "greatest hits" set, suggesting a varied flow of fan‑favorite numbers throughout the show.
